attributes.description: 苏联切尔诺贝利核电站4号机组发生的严重核泄漏事故，被列为国际核事件分级最高级别7级
位于乌克兰北部普里皮亚季市附近，距基辅约130公里
采用RBMK-1000型石墨慢化沸水堆，额定热功率3200MW，电功率1000MW，存在正空泡系数设计缺陷

85744845-74d.name: 安全测试
85744845-74d.summary: 计划中的安全验证程序

attributes.description: 验证在外部电源中断后，汽轮机惯性转动能否为冷却水泵提供足够电力，以维持反应堆冷却直到备用柴油发电机启动
切尔诺贝利核电站所属国家

260de623-d9f.name: RBMK-1000反应堆
260de623-d9f.summary: 存在设计缺陷的反应堆类型

attributes.description: 石墨慢化沸水堆，具有正空泡系数缺陷（冷却水汽化时反应堆功率不降反升）
乌克兰北部城市，切尔诺贝利核电站所在地

9e3b6eef-763.name: Power Reduction Start
9e3b6eef-763.summary: Planned reduction of reactor power from 3200MW thermal power

attributes.description: Specific occurrence where reactor power reduction began as scheduled from the rated 3200MW thermal power.

bc624adb-c07.name: Test Delay
bc624adb-c07.summary: Delay of the safety test requested by Kyiv Grid Dispatch Center

attributes.description: Specific occurrence where the test was delayed, and reactor power was maintained at 1600MW.
Specific occurrence where power reduction operations were restarted after the delay.

ba4b3f25-01d.name: Power Plunge
ba4b3f25-01d.summary: Sudden drop in reactor power to 30MW due to operator error

attributes.description: Specific occurrence where reactor power plummeted to 30MW, far below the planned 700MW, leading to xenon poisoning.

a88cd870-02d.name: Xenon Poisoning
a88cd870-02d.summary: Operational state caused by low reactor power

attributes.description: Environmental or operational state where xenon buildup occurred as a result of the power plunge.

076754bf-42b.name: Control Rod Withdrawal
076754bf-42b.summary: Withdrawal of control rods by operators, violating safety regulations

attributes.description: Specific occurrence where operators withdrew most control rods, leaving only 6-8 rods, which breached the safety regulation requiring a minimum of 30 rods.
Specific occurrence where reactor power was restored to 200MW, but the reactor entered an unstable state.

b1d4de77-574.name: Reactor Instability
b1d4de77-574.summary: Unstable operational state of the reactor

attributes.description: Environmental or operational state where the reactor became highly unstable after power recovery.

d050d889-dd5.name: Safety Test Start
d050d889-dd5.summary: Initiation of the planned safety verification procedure

attributes.description: Planned safety verification procedure to test if turbine coastdown could provide sufficient power to cooling water pumps until backup diesel generators started; involved closing turbine steam supply.

7a0ab1c0-2b7.name: AZ-5 Button Press
7a0ab1c0-2b7.summary: Pressing of the AZ-5 emergency shutdown button by Akimov

attributes.description: Specific occurrence where shift supervisor Akimov pressed the AZ-5 emergency shutdown button.

9170c458-eb7.name: Power Surge
9170c458-eb7.summary: Rapid increase in reactor power to over 100 times nominal value

attributes.description: Specific occurrence where reactor power surged to approximately 33000MW (over 100 times nominal) within 4 seconds, with core temperature exceeding 2000°C.
Specific occurrence where a steam explosion blew off the reactor lid.

20fe9bd1-b98.name: Reactor Lid Blown Off
20fe9bd1-b98.summary: Dislodging of the reactor lid due to explosion

attributes.description: Specific occurrence where the reactor lid, weighing 1000 tons, was blown off by the steam explosion.

ff6dc28e-e15.name: Akimov
ff6dc28e-e15.summary: Shift supervisor involved in pressing the AZ-5 button

attributes.description: Key individual who ordered and pressed the AZ-5 emergency shutdown button.

de67114f-f71.name: Kyiv Grid Dispatch Center
de67114f-f71.summary: Institution that requested the test delay

attributes.description: Institution or group that influenced events by requesting a delay in the safety test.

6d8b4212-b2c.name: Reactor
6d8b4212-b2c.summary: Nuclear reactor unit involved in the events

attributes.description: Nuclear reactor unit with specific design characteristics, subject to power changes and instability.

6afb7e52-fbf.name: Safety Regulation on Control Rods
6afb7e52-fbf.summary: Formal rule requiring minimum control rods for safety

attributes.description: Formal safety rule specifying that a minimum of 30 control rods must be inserted to maintain reactor safety.

78731065-013.name: AZ-5 Emergency Shutdown Button
78731065-013.summary: Engineered safety mechanism for emergency reactor shutdown

attributes.description: Safety mechanism designed to initiate an emergency shutdown of the reactor when pressed.

8f5ac1e3-ac8.name: Cooling Water Pumps
8f5ac1e3-ac8.summary: Safety components for maintaining reactor cooling

attributes.description: Engineered safety components that require power to maintain reactor cooling, as referenced in the safety test purpose.

ff16ab12-62a.name: Backup Diesel Generators
ff16ab12-62a.summary: Backup power source intended to start after external power loss

attributes.description: Engineered safety mechanisms designed to provide backup power after an external power interruption, as referenced in the safety test purpose.

0f37bd2e-5d6.name: 蒸汽爆炸
0f37bd2e-5d6.summary: 蒸汽爆炸事件导致反应堆顶盖被掀飞

attributes.description: 在01:23:45发生的蒸汽爆炸，导致重达1000吨的反应堆顶盖被掀飞

dfe21414-2fd.name: 氢爆
dfe21414-2fd.summary: 氢爆事件导致石墨慢化剂起火和放射性物质抛射

attributes.description: 在01:23:47发生的第二次爆炸（氢爆），导致石墨慢化剂起火燃烧，放射性物质被抛射至1200米高空
具有设计缺陷的核反应堆，包括正空泡系数缺陷、AZ-5系统缺陷和缺乏安全壳

26124d09-7b6.name: 正空泡系数缺陷
26124d09-7b6.summary: 冷却水减少时功率反而增加的设计缺陷

attributes.description: RBMK反应堆的设计缺陷，当冷却水减少时，反应堆功率反而增加

042fd9a3-36f.name: AZ-5紧急停堆系统
042fd9a3-36f.summary: 紧急停堆系统但有致命缺陷

attributes.description: 控制棒底部装有石墨段，插入初期会先排出冷却水、引入石墨，短暂增加反应性而非降低

0155d508-f86.name: 安全壳缺乏
0155d508-f86.summary: 缺乏混凝土安全壳的状态

attributes.description: RBMK反应堆没有西方核电站标配的混凝土安全壳
计划的安全测试，但未经核安全部门审批
被操作员切断的多个安全保护系统
操作员违规抽出过多控制棒，远低于安全下限

abc4130d-7aa.name: 反应堆不稳定状态
abc4130d-7aa.summary: 反应堆处于不稳定操作状态

attributes.description: 反应堆在不稳定状态下，操作员强行进行测试
在反应堆不稳定状态下强行进行的测试
缺乏对RBMK反应堆特性充分了解的值班人员
测试方案未经其审批的核安全部门
切断安全保护系统和违规操作控制棒的操作员
具有保密文化，导致设计缺陷未被公开讨论
忽视安全规程、组织测试计划混乱的管理层
被管理层忽视和操作员违反的安全规程
组织混乱，原定白班进行但被推迟到夜班的测试计划

46035f89-062.name: 培训不足
46035f89-062.summary: 操作人员培训不足的状态

attributes.description: 操作人员不了解反应堆在低功率下的危险特性
苏联核工业体系的保密文化，导致设计缺陷未被公开讨论

01036b4e-41e.name: 安全测试推迟
01036b4e-41e.summary: 核安全测试被延迟到夜班进行

attributes.description: 计划中的安全测试被推迟至夜班时段执行

0f0ec552-80a.name: 操作人员培训不足
0f0ec552-80a.summary: 操作员缺乏低功率反应堆风险知识

attributes.description: 操作人员未接受充分培训，不了解反应堆在低功率下的危险特性

d4a7cf90-228.name: 2名工人死亡
d4a7cf90-228.summary: 爆炸导致两名工人当场死亡

attributes.description: 两名工人在核事故爆炸中当场死亡

38f3bbc5-27d.name: 28名消防员死亡
38f3bbc5-27d.summary: 消防员和工作人员因辐射死亡

attributes.description: 28名消防员和核电站工作人员因急性辐射综合征死亡
释放的放射性物质相当于400枚广岛原子弹

f441e78e-2cf.name: 放射性尘埃扩散
f441e78e-2cf.summary: 放射性污染覆盖大面积区域

attributes.description: 放射性尘埃覆盖15.5万平方公里，波及欧洲23个国家

935df45b-b71.name: 世卫组织癌症预估
935df45b-b71.summary: 辐射致癌人数的官方估计

attributes.description: 世界卫生组织预估4000-9000人因辐射患癌
30公里隔离区内约35万人被永久疏散
总经济损失超过2000亿美元
苏联国际形象严重受损
推动了全球核安全标准的根本性改革
苏联领导人，称事故为'苏联解体的真正原因'

5c96544b-0a3.name: Chernobyl Nuclear Accident
5c96544b-0a3.summary: Nuclear accident at Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant

attributes.description: The catastrophic nuclear accident that occurred at the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant, referred to as a key event in the text.
The event where the Soviet Union dissolved, claimed by Mikhail Gorbachev to be caused by the Chernobyl Nuclear Accident.

e051a2e3-8ab.name: Reform of Global Nuclear Safety Standards
e051a2e3-8ab.summary: Reforms in nuclear safety standards worldwide

attributes.description: Fundamental reforms in global nuclear safety standards pushed by the Chernobyl Nuclear Accident.

af98c6b5-552.name: Viktor Bryukhanov
af98c6b5-552.summary: Director of Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant

attributes.description: Key individual involved in the Chernobyl Nuclear Accident; sentenced to 10 years in prison after the accident.
Key individual directly responsible for the Safety Test; sentenced to 10 years in prison after the accident.
Key individual who ordered the pressing of the AZ-5 Button; died from radiation after the accident.
Key individual who executed the power reduction and control rod withdrawal operations; died from radiation after the accident.

e4afbc64-3ca.name: Valery Legasov
e4afbc64-3ca.summary: Academician of Soviet Academy of Sciences

attributes.description: Key individual who was a member of the Accident Investigation Committee; committed suicide in 1988.

af5348d8-842.name: Boris Shcherbina
af5348d8-842.summary: Deputy Chairman of Soviet Council of Ministers

attributes.description: Key individual responsible for the aftermath work of the Chernobyl Nuclear Accident.
Key individual who claimed the Chernobyl Nuclear Accident was the real cause of the Dissolution of the Soviet Union.
Institution where the Chernobyl Nuclear Accident occurred; managed by Viktor Bryukhanov.

1b8f4e92-a2a.name: Soviet Academy of Sciences

attributes.description: Institution where Valery Legasov was an academician.
Group formed to investigate the Chernobyl Nuclear Accident; Valery Legasov was a member.

1680eaf5-ab5.name: Soviet Council of Ministers
1680eaf5-ab5.summary: Government body of the Soviet Union

attributes.description: Institution where Boris Shcherbina served as deputy chairman; involved in the aftermath work.
Specific reactor unit where the Chernobyl Nuclear Accident occurred; supervised by Alexander Akimov.
Safety test for which Anatoly Dyatlov was directly responsible; conducted at Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant.
Safety component pressed during the Chernobyl Nuclear Accident; ordered by Alexander Akimov.
Site where the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant is located and the accident occurred.

8c7fba99-4aa.name: Power Reduction and Control Rod Withdrawal

attributes.description: Specific actions involving reducing power and withdrawing control rods, executed by Leonid Toptunov during the accident.
Event involving the investigation of the Chernobyl Nuclear Accident; Valery Legasov participated as a committee member.
Event involving managing the consequences of the Chernobyl Nuclear Accident; Boris Shcherbina was responsible.

0cd8f29b-8a4.name: PRECEDED_BY

6a0f1dd4-68c.name: PRECEDED_BY
6a0f1dd4-68c.fact: The power reduction resume event was preceded by the test delay event in the sequence.

57b3842e-9e8.name: PRECEDED_BY
57b3842e-9e8.fact: The power plunge event was preceded by the power reduction resume event in the sequence.

34adb21d-677.name: CAUSED_BY
34adb21d-677.fact: Xenon poisoning was caused by the power plunge event.

070f8392-0f1.name: PRECEDED_BY
070f8392-0f1.fact: The control rod withdrawal event was preceded by the power plunge event in the sequence.

f48bed4e-c89.name: VIOLATED
f48bed4e-c89.fact: The control rod withdrawal event violated the safety regulation on control rods.

5a22145b-07c.name: PRECEDED_BY
5a22145b-07c.fact: The power recovery event was preceded by the control rod withdrawal event in the sequence.

186e8fb9-e22.name: CAUSED_BY
186e8fb9-e22.fact: Reactor instability was caused by the power recovery event.

0c58ef16-8b5.name: PRECEDED_BY
0c58ef16-8b5.fact: The safety test start event was preceded by the power recovery event in the sequence.

5fc262ed-679.name: PRECEDED_BY
5fc262ed-679.fact: The AZ-5 button press event was preceded by the safety test start event in the sequence.

6c146221-660.name: PARTICIPATED_IN
6c146221-660.fact: Akimov participated in the AZ-5 button press event.

ba053320-dbf.name: TRIGGERED_BY
ba053320-dbf.fact: The power surge event was triggered by the AZ-5 button press event.

49350b08-208.name: CAUSED_BY
49350b08-208.fact: The steam explosion event was caused by the power surge event.

bad32a7d-9a8.name: CAUSED_BY
bad32a7d-9a8.fact: The reactor lid blown off event was caused by the steam explosion event.

12dc9a5e-483.name: PARTICIPATED_IN
12dc9a5e-483.fact: Kyiv Grid Dispatch Center participated in the test delay event by requesting the delay.

cbdee272-df8.name: CAUSED_BY
